items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the idempotent projection re-apply semantics, but the prior steps do not provide any evidence related to this requirement. While there are multiple successful steps related to bookings and configurations, none of them address the specific need for idempotent projection re-apply semantics. This indicates a lack of necessary evidence to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
